rows.label: tev011501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Jim about the duties of a Companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Jim if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Jim for his thoughts
on public order in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Jim about the enemy assault.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Jim if he has any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Jim what he's going to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Jim about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Jim about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0001
rows.name:
While the rest of the BLADEs are doing battle
outside the city, we Companion are responsible
for resolving conflicts within NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0002
rows.name:
To do so, we patrol the city streets
looking for signs of trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0003
rows.name:
There's no telling when enemies
might slip past the Interceptor
and make their way into the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0004
rows.name:
We're all keeping a focused watch for
anything that seems out of the ordinary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0005
rows.name:
After all, this is a foreign world where anything
could happen. For all we know, there could be an
invisible xenoform standing behind you right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Most new BLADE recruits are placed in Unions
focused on outside exploration, leaving the
Companion Union chronically understaffed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Admittedly, our duties involve
less danger than battling it
out with angry indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0010
rows.name:
But indigens don't voice petty
grievances or become violent
over ideology, now do they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm just saying that beyond suppressing threats,
we must also listen to our citizens and strive
to understand where they're coming from.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Doing our job the right way takes
time and manpower. Honestly, we
could use a few more people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Thanks to everyone's hard work, most of the
city's functionality has been restored, and
our lives have become a little more normal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0021
rows.name:
However, that's also allowed the
criminal element to emerge from hiding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Suspicious activities have begun to
occur throughout NLA, and even we
Companion don't have all the details.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0023
rows.name:
No one's going to post about such criminal
activities on Quest Board, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0024
rows.name:
We have to learn about and
resolve them by speaking to
the people of NLA directly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0025
rows.name:
If you're a righteous BLADE with a will to
help the people of this city, you should lend
an ear to any citizen who seems troubled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0040
rows.name:
We Companion were attacked as we led
the evacuation of the civilians, and
had to fight in their defense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0041
rows.name:
Sadly, many of my friends died
holding back the Growth attackers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0042
rows.name:
So that's the power level of the
enemy we're facing— we can barely
protect the things we value most.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0043
rows.name:
The way things are now,
we don't stand a chance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0044
rows.name:
BLADE needs to strengthen itself,
and I'm wondering if perhaps our
new xenoform friends can help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0047
rows.name:
Recently, a Ma-non named
Aqual joined the Companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0048
rows.name:
As more xenoforms move into NLA, we encounter
more and more situations where our human
intuition is simply not up to the task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0049
rows.name:
Aqual was recruited into the
Companion to help us with
these sorts of situations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0050
rows.name:
His behavior can be impetuous for a Ma-non,
and he's a little reckless, but he has a
strong sense of justice. I quite like him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0051
rows.name:
We've never had a xenoform colleague
before, but I think we're all going
to get along just fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0056
rows.name:
At a glance, NLA seems to be
at peace ever since your team
defeated the Growth boss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0057
rows.name:
But as the city transforms into a melting pot
of various xenoform races, maintaining public
order has become a much greater challenge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0058
rows.name:
As far as the Companion are concerned,
our war has only just begun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG0059
rows.name:
But it's a war I'm confident we can win.
You fought hard to bring us peace, and we
will do what we must to maintain it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG1001
rows.name:
Aqual is fond of saying "We Ma-non
owe our lives to humanity, and I
intend to pay that debt."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG1002
rows.name:
After all the benefit we've reaped
from Ma-non tech, I don't know if
that even holds true anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG1003
rows.name:
But he's a stubborn guy, and really
serious about seeing justice done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG1004
rows.name:
His enthusiasm even inspired me to devote
myself more forcefully to my duties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG1005
rows.name:
Like him, I won't let anything
stand in the way of doing what
I believe to be right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG2001
rows.name:
I still can't believe that Powell from
Army Pizza was the Ma-non serial killer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG2002
rows.name:
Aqual did great work on that case.
Now all the Ma-non living in NLA
will be able to rest easier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG2003
rows.name:
Still, we have to make sure nothing
like that ever happens again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG2004
rows.name:
We must make NLA a safe city
for everyone, no matter what
planet they come from. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011501_MSG2005
rows.name:
And like Aqual, I'm going to do whatever
it takes to back that promise up![ST:wait ]
